original_text: Welcome to English in a Minute. If you've ever gardened, you know weeds grow super fast. They can take over a garden overnight. But what does grow like a weed mean in other situations? Hey, Dan! Do you want to see pictures from my trip home? Oh jeez, I would love to, but… Great. This is me with my little cousin Arlo. Little? He's taller than you. I know! He is growing like a weed. He's only ten. Does he have a beard? To grow like a weed just means to grow very quickly. We mostly use this expression when talking about how fast children grow. And that's English in a minute.
